PROJECT SETUP
=============

Initialize the project repository with TypeScript configuration,
linting setup, and CI/CD pipeline.

Install core dependencies and configure the build system.

DATABASE LAYER
==============

1. Schema Design

Design the database schema for users, posts, and comments.
Use PostgreSQL with proper indexes and constraints.

2. Migration System

Build database migration tooling with Knex.js.
Support up/down migrations and seed data.

3. Connection Pool

Configure connection pooling with proper timeout handling
and health checks.

API DESIGN
==========

1. REST Endpoints

Define RESTful API endpoints following OpenAPI 3.0 specification.
Include proper error codes and response schemas.

2. Authentication

Implement JWT-based authentication with refresh tokens.
Support API key authentication for service-to-service calls.

DEPLOYMENT
==========

Configure Docker containers and Kubernetes manifests.
Set up staging and production environments.
